name: Assertions & Invariants
def: Runtime checks of conditions that must always hold, documenting and enforcing invariants.
problem: Catch impossible states and broken assumptions immediately, near their cause.
mechanism: assert(condition) aborts (or throws) if a should-always-be-true condition is false; often compiled out in release builds.
limits: Usually disabled in release (no protection then)
failures: Putting effects inside assert (vanish in release)
Using asserts for user input validation
myths: "Assertions protect production" — they are typically compiled out in release
